items.name: Golden Tengu, Japanese traditional mask
items.description:
✨ ✨ LIMITED EDITION ✨ ✨ 
🔴 Other variations:

White Tengu, Japanese traditional mask:
https://www.roblox.com/catalog/124507370440659

Black Tengu, Japanese traditional mask:
https://www.roblox.com/catalog/76162011454800/

Red Tengu, Japanese traditional mask:
https://www.roblox.com/catalog/83744288875009

The red Tengu mask with its long, bulbous nose and stern expression is one of the most distinctive of all traditional Japanese masks. 
This wooden, reddish-brown mask is deeply connected to Japanese folklore, representing the mythical Tengu, a bird-like creature. 
These beings, known as 「天狗  •（てんぐ  •  Tengu）」, are often associated with their mystical abilities and are seen as protectors of the mountains and forests. 

Made by wyssion
All rights reserved.

More from Aluvion UGC: https://www.roblox.com/catalog?Category=1&CreatorName=Aluvion+UGC&salesTypeFilter=1&SortType=3&IncludeNotForSale

items.name: puppy
items.description:
More Accessories: https://www.roblox.com/catalog?Category=1&CreatorName=DreamLabs%20Clothing&CreatorType=Group&salesTypeFilter=1&IncludeNotForSale


In the wild forest, beneath the full moon, a majestic puppy wolf howls. Its pack gathers near, their spirits unbound. The doge wolf's howl echoes through the night, calling to all the animals in the forest.

Even the werewolves dance in the clouds, their wolf spirits awakened by the full moon. The wolf pack is a wild and untamed force, warriors of the night. Their howling is a primal song, a celebration of life.

Dogs and wolves may be different animals, but they share a deep bond. The dog howls at the moon, its soul connected to the wolf pack.

On this wild night, the wolf's howl is a reminder of the magic that surrounds us.

items.name: 🦇 Ravenshade Coat [PBR]
items.description:
Unleash your dark elegance with the Ravenshade Coat — a gothic masterpiece of torn feathers and sleek shadow tones. Crafted with realistic PBR materials, this design blends mystery, power, and refined chaos. Perfect for fantasy, vampire, or shadow-themed avatars.
💡 Why You’ll Love It
Dramatic feathered silhouette inspired by ravens and nightfall 🌒
Sharp tailored jacket design with flowing, jagged edges 🖤
PBR textures deliver realistic shine and depth for maximum style ⚡
Ideal for dark fantasy, gothic, and magic roleplay worlds 🕯️
🔍 Keywords: gothic, raven, dark, fantasy, coat, shadow, mage, vampire, PBR, Roblox
Embrace the night —
the Ravenshade Coat is your armor of elegance and darkness. 🕊️🔥
